measurement_note: Size is N, the input string length governing the required linear scan. Every tier is a uniform even-length string, so its best odd palindrome lengths are the two closest odd values summing to N. The reference uses Manacher radii and linear endpoint propagation. A correct slower implementation expands every odd center independently, completes all tiers, and fails by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: uniform string of length thirty-two
benchmark: uniform string of length one hundred twenty-eight
benchmark: uniform string of length five hundred twelve
